description: When dropping below a health threshold, gain a large armor bonus and taunt nearby enemies once.
tooltipTemplate: When HP drops below {hpThresholdPercent%}: gain +{bonusArmor} armor and taunt all enemies within {tauntRadius} for {tauntDurationSeconds:1}s.

description: Whenever this unit is struck, the attacker briefly deals reduced damage.
tooltipTemplate: Each hit you receive causes the attacker to deal {weakenedMultiplier%} less damage for {durationSeconds:1}s.

description: Gain bonus armor when surrounded by two or more enemies.
tooltipTemplate: When {enemyThreshold} or more enemies are within {radius} units: gain +{bonusArmor} armor.

description: After holding position for a short time, gain a bonus shield. The shield is lost the moment this unit moves.
tooltipTemplate: After standing still for {stationaryThresholdSeconds:1}s, gain a shield up to {maxShield} HP. Lost immediately on moving.

description: Vanguard's attacks mark the target, causing them to take bonus damage from all sources.
tooltipTemplate: Attacks mark the target for {durationSeconds:1}s. Marked enemies take +{bonusMultiplier%} damage from all sources.
